providers.subtitle: Claude models from Anthropic. Requires an Anthropic API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Anthropic API key to enable Claude.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to the Anthropic Console, navigate to API Keys, and create a new key.

providers.subtitle: GPT models from OpenAI. Requires an OpenAI API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your OpenAI API key to enable GPT.

credentialsGuide.description: Log in to the OpenAI platform, go to API Keys, and generate a new secret key.

providers.subtitle: Multimodal Gemini models from Google. Requires a Gemini API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Gemini API key to enable Google models.

credentialsGuide.description: Visit Google AI Studio, sign in with your Google account, and create an API key.

providers.subtitle: Run local models via Ollama. No API key required.
providers.setupHint: Install Ollama locally and pull the models you want to use.

credentialsGuide.description: Download and install Ollama, then pull models via `ollama pull <model>`.

providers.subtitle: Open-source models served by Fireworks. Requires a Fireworks API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Fireworks API key to enable open-source models.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to the Fireworks dashboard and create an API key.

providers.subtitle: Open models served by Together AI. Requires a Together API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Together API key to enable Together models.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to the Together dashboard and create an API key.

providers.subtitle: Route to many LLM providers via a single OpenRouter API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your OpenRouter API key to access multiple models.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to OpenRouter and create an API key.

providers.subtitle: Route to many LLM providers via a single Vercel AI Gateway API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Vercel AI Gateway API key to access multiple models.

credentialsGuide.description: Open the Vercel dashboard's AI Gateway tab and create an API key.

providers.subtitle: Bring your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint (vLLM, LMStudio, Groq, Together, etc.).
providers.setupHint: Enter the base URL of your endpoint and at least one model identifier.

providers.subtitle: MiniMax AI models. Requires a MiniMax API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your MiniMax API key to enable MiniMax models.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to the MiniMax dashboard and create an API key.

providers.subtitle: Atlas Cloud AI models (OpenAI-compatible). Requires an Atlas Cloud API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Atlas Cloud API key to enable Atlas Cloud models.

credentialsGuide.description: Sign in to the Atlas Cloud console and create an API key.
